input: Our users are unhappy. NPS dropped from 45 to 12 in two quarters. Decompose this problem into actionable sub-problems.
Explain MECE decomposition with an example. How do I validate that my decomposition is both mutually exclusive and collectively exhaustive?
I decomposed a migration project into 25 leaf tasks. How do I find the critical path and identify what can run in parallel?
When should I use first principles thinking instead of decomposing by analogy to similar past problems?
My problem decomposition keeps changing as I learn more. The problem seems to shift shape every time I dig into a sub-problem. What kind of problem is this and how do I handle it?
